page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.6xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance configured with dedicated compute resources. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 24 vCPUs mapped directly to 24 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, the instance ensures dedicated physical execution units per vCPU, eliminating resource contention from hyper-threading. The system is provisioned with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio.

The instance relies on the KVM hypervisor for virtualization and does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. Network connectivity is supported by an 18 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Because local storage is absent, storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. The high memory-to-core ratio makes this instance class qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute cores, avoiding the overhead of over-provisioning vCPUs simply to acquire more RAM.
Appropriate workloads for the ecs.hfr9i.6xlarge include in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-intensive data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.6xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 24 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 24 physical Intel Xeon 6982P-C cores running at 3.4 GHz. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it provides 192.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering an 18 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, it delivers dedicated physical execution resources without hyper-threading. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive applications, minimizing compute over-provisioning. It is suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications.

tagline: A memory-optimized instance featuring twenty-four dedicated physical Intel Xeon cores and one hundred ninety-two gigabytes of RAM for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 24 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores at 3.4 GHz
192.0 GB of system memory with an 8.0 GB per core ratio
No local storage or GPU hardware included
KVM hypervisor virtualization on x86_64 architecture
Suited for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise applications
